failures.description: The agent misread or ignored the catalog search result. It should have answered with the matching available beginner Jigsaw Puzzle, item_id 1096508426, price $46.13, but instead claimed there were no matching items.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The relevant tool output was available at index 3: ProductCatalogSearch returned ok=true, count=1, with item_id 1096508426 priced at 46.13 and matching available=true, product_type Jigsaw Puzzle, difficulty level beginner, and price_min 45.76. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite conclusion, stating that no items match. This directly contradicts the tool output and was not corrected later; the Evaluator even approved the inconsistent answer.
